mapper.insert: insert into friend (roleId, latelyPlayers, friends, enemies, shields, sendLogs, receiveLogs,approvalList,shieldAddFriend) values (#{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{latelyPlayers,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{friends,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{enemies,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{shields,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{sendLogs,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{receiveLogs,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} , #{approvalList,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{shieldAddFriend,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})
